tasks: Write the first usage summary for useradd to /root/rhcsa10-man.txt using local documentation.
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Write the first usage summary for useradd to /root/rhcsa10-man.txt using
solution_commands: if man useradd >/tmp/rhcsa10-useradd-man.txt 2>/dev/null; then man useradd | col -b | grep -m1 -A1 '^SYNOPSIS' > /root/rhcsa10-man.txt; else useradd --help | grep -m1 -A1 '^Usage' > /root/rhcsa10-man.txt; fi
